docs: Remove a token holding. Can be called by owner, manager, or Registry (for tier removal).
messages.label: remove_token_holding

docs: Initialize base portfolio value (owner only, once)
messages.label: initialize_base_portfolio_value

docs: Emergency reset index base value (owner only)
messages.label: emergency_reset_base_value

docs: Update a token holding (called by portfolio_manager during rebalancing/buy/sell)
messages.label: update_holding_from_manager

docs: Add to total fees collected (called by portfolio_manager)
messages.label: add_fees_from_manager

docs: Update index value from manager with calculated portfolio value
messages.label: update_index_from_manager
